expectations.text: Response shows the `runic merge abc123 def456 -m "..."` command
expectations.evidence: runic merge abc123 def456 -m "merge feature-x and feature-y into main" shown in step 2

expectations.text: Merge revision file shows down_revision as a tuple, e.g. ("abc123", "def456")
Explains to run `runic upgrade head` after creating the merge revision
Does NOT suggest manually editing existing migration files as the resolution strategy
expectations.evidence: Only creates a new merge revision, does not mention editing existing files

expectations.text: Merge revision function signature is def upgrade(op) -> None: (not using MigrationContext)
expectations.evidence: def upgrade(op) -> None: with `pass` body — correct signature
